name: analytics-observability
scope: Three-phase analytics framework upgrade: (1.A) hygiene + (1.B) gates, (2) live event debugger (local mirror + GA4 Realtime MCP poll), (3) dashboards (control-room/analytics route + Looker Studio template). Closes 56-row CSV drift + 4 unfired events + 21 untested + disconnected GA4 MCP. Approach B (phased single feature) per 2026-05-13 brainstorm.
launch_window: Phase 1.A + Phase 2: 2026-05-15 → 22 (between v7.8.5.1 ship and v7.9 Phase E start). Phase 3: 2026-05-21 → 06-04 (parallel with v7.9 Phase E monitoring). Phase 1.B gates: 2026-06-04 → 06-26 via 22d Calibration Protocol (advisory 06-04 → 06-11; calibration 06-11 → 06-18; promotion decision 06-18; Phase E exit 06-25).

blocker_resolutions.sequencing: Revised 3-window plan (1.A + 2 next week, 3 during Phase E, 1.B post Phase E)
blocker_resolutions.csv_ownership: Single canonical CSV in FT2; D-1 reverse-sync extends to fitme-story build read
blocker_resolutions.live_debugger_flavor: Both local mirror (websocket + /analytics watch CLI) and GA4 Realtime MCP poll
blocker_resolutions.dashboard_surface: Both /control-room/analytics route and Looker Studio template
blocker_resolutions.infra_plan_fold_in: Approach A — sub-doc of infra master plan; Phase 1.B becomes F19/F20 in v8.0 docket

sources: Cross-reference iOS enum (114 events) vs analytics-taxonomy.csv (58 rows)
fitme-story web analytics survey (12/14 events wired)
GA4 MCP adapter status (defined, not connected)

secondary.name: Declared-but-unwired web events (excluding intentional forward-declared)
secondary.note: Re-baselined 2026-05-13 Phase 1.A.4: the 2 declared-but-unwired web events (design_system_component_expand + design_system_code_copy) are intentional forward-declarations honored by the [FORWARD-DECLARED] CSV tag convention. They are no longer counted as drift.

metrics.kill_criteria: If Phase 1.B gates (CSV_TAXONOMY_DRIFT + GA4_MCP_DISCONNECTED) produce >5% false positive rate in 7-day Phase C calibration window, defer gate enforcement to v7.10 and ship hygiene-only outcome.

transitions.note: Approach B (phased single feature) + revised 3-window sequencing + single canonical CSV + both debugger surfaces + both dashboard surfaces + Approach A infra-plan fold-in. 4 decisions locked.

tasks.title: CSV taxonomy backfill (49 events + 7 screens + 1 user prop)
tasks.outcome: 0 missing events (was 49). 0 missing screens (was 7). 0 missing user properties (was 1). All 114 enum events in CSV via flat-scan.

tasks.title: Resolve declared-but-unfired ai_recommendation_* events
tasks.outcome: DELETED both events (aiRecommendationAccepted + aiRecommendationDismissed) — they were duplicates of home_ai_feedback_submitted which already carries rating: positive/negative. Removed enum constants, removed CSV rows, updated funnel-definitions.md + master plan §5.1 task entry. Enum 114 → 112; CSV stays aligned 112/112.

tasks.title: Resolve declared-but-unwired fitme-story design_system_* events
tasks.outcome: RE-CLASSIFIED as forward-declared (per master plan §5.4 new convention). Both helpers exist in fitme-story src/lib/design-system-analytics.ts awaiting UI (ComponentCard expand + Copy snippet button). Tagged [FORWARD-DECLARED] prefix in CSV Notes. Phase 1.B CSV_TAXONOMY_DRIFT gate logic will honor this structured tag. Metric re-baselined: 'Declared-but-unwired web events' from drift-counted to intent-honored.
tasks.followup_fitme_story_pr: JSDoc tags @forward-declared on the 2 helpers in src/lib/design-system-analytics.ts (separate PR for fitme-story repo)

tasks.title: Add 19 iOS analytics tests for previously-untested events
tasks.outcome: Coverage 81% → 100% (93/112 → 112/112). Added 19 new XCTest methods across 3 test files: HomeAnalyticsTests (4), ImportPersistenceAndAnalyticsTests (1), AnalyticsTests (14). Each test asserts event captured + enum constant + raw string match + key parameters. Pattern matches existing tests via MockAnalyticsAdapter + AnalyticsService convenience methods.

tasks.title: Refresh external-sync-status.json analytics block
tasks.outcome: Updated 'updated' timestamp + added new analytics_taxonomy_status block reflecting Phase 1.A reality (CSV 112/112, test coverage 100%, 0 unfired iOS events, web events status). Replaced findings array with current Phase 1.A summary. Preserved instrumentation_summary as backward-compat reference (40-metric framework — separate from event-taxonomy work).

tasks.title: Local analytics mirror SSE server (Phase 2 begins)
tasks.outcome: New scripts/analytics-watch-server.py (stdlib-only, no pip deps). HTTP/SSE design: POST /event, GET /stream (SSE), GET /health. iOS uses URLSession SSE; browser uses EventSource. Tests at scripts/tests/test_analytics_watch_server.py: 7/7 pass — health/POST/SSE/sequence/subscriber-count/404/JSON-validation. Server listens on localhost:8765 by default. Phase 2 (live debugger) begins.

tasks.title: CLI sub-command + skill docs
tasks.outcome: New scripts/analytics-watch.py (CLI client for the SSE server shipped in 2.A.1). Connects to localhost:8765/stream, prints events in real time. Supports --filter (substring OR-semantics), --raw (JSON output), --no-color, --server URL. Stdlib-only. Tests at scripts/tests/test_analytics_watch.py: 12/12 pass (7 pure-function + 5 integration). Skill docs added at .claude/skills/analytics/SKILL.md.

tasks.title: iOS DebugSinkAdapter — tee events to local SSE sink under DEBUG_ANALYTICS=1
tasks.outcome: New FitTracker/Services/Analytics/DebugSinkAdapter.swift wraps base AnalyticsProvider (Firebase/Mock); transparent passthrough when DEBUG_ANALYTICS env var unset. When set, tees logEvent + logScreenView to localhost:8765/event via fire-and-forget HTTP POST. NEVER tees user-identity APIs (PII safe). Wired into AnalyticsService.makeDefault. 14 XCTest methods at FitTrackerTests/DebugSinkAdapterTests.swift cover passthrough + tee + PII safety + env-driven sink resolution. Both files added to project.pbxproj (4 locations each).

tasks.title: fitme-story web mirror function — tee gtag emits when NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG_ANALYTICS=1
tasks.outcome: New fitme-story/src/lib/analytics-debug-mirror.ts. resolveSinkURL() reads NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG_ANALYTICS=1 at module load. teeToDebugMirror(eventName, params) called from design-system-analytics.ts + control-room/analytics.ts emit() functions after gtag emit. Fire-and-forget fetch with keepalive: true, credentials: 'omit', mode: 'cors'. Failures swallowed (production safety). 8 node:test tests at src/lib/__tests__/analytics-debug-mirror.test.ts. Shipped via fitme-story PR #107 (squash 1ec463c).

tasks.title: /analytics poll sub-command + GA4 MCP setup runbook
tasks.outcome: Doc-only deliverable. NEW docs/setup/ga4-mcp-setup-guide.md (~270 lines, 7 steps + troubleshooting + cross-refs) — operator runbook for installing mcp-server-ga4 + Google Cloud service account + property access. UPDATED .claude/skills/analytics/SKILL.md /analytics poll section from placeholder to full procedure (5-step MCP tool flow + failure modes + cross-references). Phase 2 (live debugger) is now COMPLETE — local-mirror surface (2.A.1-4) + GA4 Realtime poll surface (2.B.1) both shipped.

tasks.title: Phase 3 spec scaffold — master plan §7.5/§7.6 + metric definitions + Looker template + control-room setup guide
tasks.outcome: Phase 3 docs landed before live-data wiring (per §7.5 calibration safety classification). Master plan §5.5 + §6.5 status snapshots updated to COMPLETE. NEW §7.5 (green/yellow/red work classification documenting which Phase 3 work is calibration-safe vs deferred to 2026-06-04). NEW §7.6 (Phase 3 status snapshot). NEW docs/master-plan/analytics-dashboard-metric-definitions.md (5-tile contract: EventVolumeTile, DriftTrendTile, TaxonomyHealthTile, RecentEventsStream, ForwardDeclaredEventsTile + Looker cross-walk). NEW docs/analytics/looker-studio-template.json (3-page dashboard spec) + .md (operator import guide). NEW docs/setup/control-room-analytics-setup-guide.md (operator dashboard setup with calibration-window note).

tasks.title: fitme-story dashboard scaffold — /control-room/analytics route + 5 tile components + types + fixtures + tests + sidebar nav
tasks.scope_note: Green-bucket items 1-4, 7 from master plan §7.5. Live GA4 binding (yellow) deferred to 2026-06-04 per Calibration Protocol.
tasks.outcome: Shipped via fitme-story PR #108 (squash 945e90c, merged 2026-05-14T09:01:51Z). New /control-room/analytics route (server component) renders 5 tiles + calibration banner: EventVolumeTile, DriftTrendTile, TaxonomyHealthTile, RecentEventsStream, ForwardDeclaredEventsTile. TypeScript contracts in src/lib/control-room/analytics-types.ts; fixture data in analytics-fixtures.ts; 7 fixture-shape tests pass via tsx --test. Sidebar nav entry added to SECONDARY_NAV. ControlRoomRoute union extended with 'analytics'. Loading skeleton + per-route README documenting calibration window. Build succeeds; route prerenders as static. All tile meta.status === 'fixture' (calibration-safety guarantee asserted by test).
